subcodes.first_line: O my friends! Thus do I beseech the Lord of bounties, and make my supplication with utter humility and lamentation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران من از خداوند ذوالمنن چنین آرزو نمایم و عجز و زاری کنم و ناله و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @light and darkness, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
